title: Research & Data Analyst Lead
description: LearnTastic is a fast-growing online education platform providing accredited continuing-education and compliance courses for professionals across industries - from healthcare and construction to HR and education. With more than 1,000 courses and over a million learners served, LearnTastic is redefining accessible, self-paced learning.
